# frostmoln_mysql_backup (Resource)

Manages a backup of a managed MySQL instance. Backups are immutable after creation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "frostmoln_mysql_backup" "daily" {
  instance_id = frostmoln_mysql_instance.main.id
  name        = "daily-backup"
  type        = "full"
}

resource "frostmoln_mysql_backup" "binlog" {
  instance_id = frostmoln_mysql_instance.main.id
  name        = "binlog-backup"
  type        = "binlog"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) The ID of the MySQL instance to back up.
- `name` (String) The name of the backup.

### Optional

- `type` (String) The type of backup: "full", "incremental", or "binlog". Defaults to "full".

### Read-Only

- `completed_at` (String) The timestamp when the backup completed.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the backup.
- `size_bytes` (Number) The size of the backup in bytes.
- `started_at` (String) The timestamp when the backup started.
- `status` (String) The current status of the backup.
